title: 6 Things to Know about AIE World's Fair 2026
summary: The AI Engineer channel announces AIE World's Fair 2026 in San Francisco, highlighting content growth, expo floor experiences, research-industry synergy, leadership tracks, and vertical-specific programming. The video promotes ticket sales with a YouTube discount code and sponsor offers worth $40k for attendees.
writeup: The AI Engineer channel previews AIE World's Fair 2026, set in San Francisco, with six items attendees should know in advance. The video outlines expanded content and expo floor, closer research-industry synergy, dedicated leadership tracks, and programming organized around AI verticals. Concrete takeaways include $40k in sponsor offers and a YouTube discount code, YOUTUBEPROMO.
